channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Liberian Leader Alexander Cummings Attends 2026 Africa CEO Forum in Kigali
item.description: Alexander B. Cummings, former Coca-Cola executive and political leader of Liberia's Alternative National Congress (ANC), took part in the 2026 Africa CEO Forum held in Kigali, Rwanda. This 13th editio...

item.title: Riverside County School Resource Officer Under Investigation for Alleged Use of Excessive Force on Student
item.description: Riverside County authorities are investigating a school resource officer who allegedly used excessive force on a female student near a Moreno Valley high school. The incident occurred on May 12, 2026,...

item.title: Mortgage Company of Canada pauses investor withdrawals amid rising delinquencies in Toronto
item.description: Mortgage Company of Canada Inc., a mortgage investment corporation (MIC) serving the Toronto region, has temporarily suspended investor redemptions and monthly distributions from its residential lendi...

item.title: Opinion: In the federal budget, Labor targeted asset taxation but overlooked larger economic reforms
item.description: In this opinion piece, columnist Josh Szeps critiques the Australian federal budget presented by Treasurer Jim Chalmers. While acknowledging the government's efforts to raise revenue through measures ...

item.title: US Justice Department likely to dismiss criminal fraud charges against Gautam Adani after SEC settlement
item.description: The United States Justice Department is reportedly close to dropping criminal fraud charges against Indian billionaire Gautam Adani. This development comes after Adani resolved a related civil fraud c...

item.title: Anglican Church calls for faith and support for Nigerians facing hunger and hardship
item.description: The Primate of the Church of Nigeria, Henry Ndukuba, dey urge Nigerians make dem no lose hope despite the wahala wey dey for economy and security. During di 13th Synod of the Anglican Diocese of Abuja...

item.title: Sienna Miller Returns to Work Three Weeks After Birth and Shares Intimate Backstage Moment
item.description: British actress Sienna Miller, 44, recently returned to work on The Tonight Show with Jimmy Fallon just three weeks after giving birth to her second child with her boyfriend Oli Green, 29. Sharing a c...

item.title: Key developments: MP High Court on Bhojshala dispute, NEET exam breach acknowledged, and political reactions intensify
item.description: In a significant ruling, the Madhya Pradesh High Court declared that the disputed Bhojshala-Kamal Maula mosque complex in Dhar is a temple dedicated to the Hindu goddess Saraswati. The court set aside...

item.title: ADC 2027 Presidential Aspirant Mohammed Hayatu-Deen Pledges Job Creation to Reduce Poverty
item.description: Mohammed Hayatu-Deen, one of the presidential aspirants under the African Democratic Congress (ADC), don talk say if Nigerians elect am in 2027, him main focus go be to create plenty jobs across the c...

item.title: Aya Care supports Lagos women football through Socca League
item.description: Hundreds of women for Lagos don dey enjoy football now through the Aya Women’s Socca League, wey dey sponsored by Aya Care and organized by The HIVE Leagues in collaboration with Socca Naija. Dis leag...

item.title: Ramaphosa to Challenge Report as Impeachment Process Looms
item.description: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa has confirmed he will legally contest a report that has opened the door for parliament to consider impeachment proceedings against him. The report relates to th...

item.title: Teaching assistant convicted for sexually abusing a young boy in her care
item.description: A teaching assistant from Bury, Terri Cook, has been sentenced to four-and-a-half years in prison for sexually abusing a young boy in her care. The abuse came to light after a member of the public rep...

item.title: Researchers Explore Diabetes Treatment from Indigenous Warburgia Salutaris Tree in KZN
item.description: In rural KwaZulu-Natal, researchers from the University of Johannesburg are investigating the potential of the indigenous Warburgia salutaris tree in developing complementary treatments for diabetes. ...

item.title: Ontario tests 10 individuals linked to hantavirus cases, monitors isolation protocols
item.description: Ontario's Ministry of Health is now testing 10 people connected to a hantavirus outbreak originating from a cruise ship, a change from earlier government statements this week. Three of the individuals...

item.title: African Parliaments Called to Clear Legal Hurdles for Climate Funding and Methane Reduction
item.description: During a regional parliamentary seminar held in Nairobi, African lawmakers were called upon to dismantle legislative and regulatory obstacles that are slowing climate financing and methane reduction e...

item.title: FG Confirms Cancellation of Foreign Scholarship Scheme, Says Local Universities Can Handle Courses
item.description: The Federal Government (FG) don make am clear say dem no go reverse the scrapping of the Bilateral Education Agreement (BEA) scholarship programme. Minister of Education, Dr Tunji Alausa, talk say the...

item.title: Common English Mistakes in Tanzanian News Reporting: Truancy and Translation Errors
item.description: The article highlights frequent errors in Tanzanian newspaper reporting caused by poor English usage and sometimes machine translation from Kiswahili. The author, Abdi Sultani, points out how poorly w...

item.title: NH Collection Resort to Boost Wellness and Luxury Tourism in Pemba Island
item.description: Pemba Island in Zanzibar is set to see a big step in luxury tourism with the upcoming NH Collection Pemba Wellness Resort, a high-end development worth over $70 million by Infinity Developments. The r...

item.title: Armoured Mobility becomes authorised armouring partner for Volkswagen South Africa
item.description: Armoured Mobility has officially been recognised as an approved armouring partner for Volkswagen South Africa. The announcement was made during the 2026 NAMPO Harvest Day in Bothaville, Free State. Th...

item.title: Challenges and Conditions in Approving Alberta's West Coast Pipeline
item.description: The proposed West Coast pipeline by Alberta, discussed in a memorandum of understanding with the federal government, faces multiple political and regulatory hurdles. Alberta Premier Danielle Smith has...
